user.title: Omni Tuya Local
user.description: Add Tuya devices using local LAN. Cloud is only used to retrieve local keys.

cloud_credentials.title: Tuya IoT Credentials
cloud_credentials.description: Enter your Tuya IoT Platform Access ID, Access Secret, and region. Only used to list devices and fetch local keys.

choose_cloud_device.title: Choose device
choose_cloud_device.description: Select the device you want to add to Home Assistant.

search_device.title: Search local IP
search_device.description: Omni will try to find **{device_name}** (`{device_id}`) on your local network. Press Submit to start the search (may take ~10 seconds).

device_details.title: Device name
device_details.description: This name will appear in Home Assistant to identify the device.

error.cloud_error: Could not connect to Tuya Cloud. Check your credentials, region, and IoT project permissions.
error.no_devices: No devices with local key were found.
error.invalid_ip: Invalid IP address format. Use format 192.168.x.x
error.connection: Could not connect locally, but the device was saved. Configure the IP later from Options.

init.title: Omni Tuya — Configure device
init.description: Select the device you want to edit. You have **{count}** registered devices.

edit_device.title: Edit {device_name}
edit_device.description:
Configure the local IP, protocol, entity type, and physical type.

**ID:** `{device_id}`
**Current IP:** `{current_ip}`
**Protocol:** `{current_version}`
**Current entity:** `{current_domain}`
**Current type:** `{current_device_type}`
**Local key:** `{local_key_masked}`

Leave local key empty to keep the current one.

abort.no_devices: No registered devices. Add one first from the integration setup or sync with Tuya Cloud.
